message: 文献这边已经开始变清楚了：这条新线更像“冻结上游后，用轻量 adapter / teaching / aggregation 把 packet 映射进可检索空间”，而不是再做一次纯 anti-collapse loss。为了把这个判断钉牢，我再补一个更贴近 token selection 的检索论文，然后就把新 survey 和控制文件一起改掉。

guidance_vm.summary: Artifact recorded. Continue from the latest durable quest state.

complete_when: The next substantive result is written durably.
